---
title: "Publications"
output:
  postcards::solana
---
**2026**

**Meta-Analysis of High-Dimensional Surrogate Markers**  
Hughes, A., Thiébaut, R., Parast, L., and Hejblum, B.P.  
*arXiv preprint*, 2026.  
[arXiv:2605.03819](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2605.03819)


**2025**

**RISE: Two-Stage Rank-Based Identification of High-Dimensional Surrogate Markers Applied to Vaccinology**  
Hughes, A., Parast, L., Thiébaut, R., and Hejblum, B.P.  
*Statistics in Medicine*, **44**(20–22), 2025.  
[doi:10.1002/sim.70241](https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.70241)
